root.summary: Legal knowledge system for labor law review with 100% strict type safety and mandatory operational directives (Local tests, Build validation, CI monitoring).

children.name: backend
children.summary: FastAPI backend with 140+ remediated strict mypy types, Pydantic V2, and 97% test coverage. Connected natively to Neo4j over Bolt.

children.name: frontend
children.summary: Next.js frontend with memoized components, explicit server actions re-exports for Turbopack compatibility, and resilient routing.
